productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Black  Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Black T-shirt made of 96% cotton and 4% elastane, has a polo neck with a black, blue and white striped collar, short sleeves with a blue stripe and ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, embroidered and appliqued branding on the left chest and right sleeve, with a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with similar colours Tumble dry low Medium iron; do not iron on decorations Polo is the king of Sports and this T-shirt from US Polo equalises that enthusiasim. Perfect for the young at heart, this tee bears a special resemblance for those associated with the oldest team sport in the world. Pair this with jeans or layer it under a cardigan for instant throw-on-and-go style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18"
